description: My Aircraft / CoPilot — type-specific V-speeds, W&B calculator, checklists, performance data, and systems descriptions

hard_stops.label: Weight Exceeds Limits
hard_stops.logic: Weight and balance calculation shows aircraft gross weight exceeds maximum allowable

hard_stops.label: CG Out of Envelope
hard_stops.logic: Calculated center of gravity falls outside the approved CG envelope for the aircraft

hard_stops.label: Performance Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Density altitude calculation shows inadequate takeoff or landing performance for available runway

soft_flags.label: AFM Version Outdated
soft_flags.logic: Uploaded AFM/POH version does not match the latest revision from the manufacturer

soft_flags.label: W&B Profile Not Synced to ForeFlight
soft_flags.logic: Weight and balance profile has not been synced to ForeFlight

soft_flags.label: Checklist Custom Modification
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has customized the standard checklist — review for completeness against manufacturer original

soft_flags.label: Performance Marginal
soft_flags.logic: Takeoff or landing performance calculations show marginal compliance with runway available
